title: Job Opening Teacher at Quest Alliance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Quest Alliance
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Teacher in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
